titleStmt.title: SII 15.236: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 236. (B.K. No. 147 of 1928-29.) HOSŪR, BADAMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Siddhēśvara temple, two miles from the village.

This is dated Śaka 1076, Yuva, Pushya śu. 14, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. If śu. is a mistake for ba. and Monday for Sunday, then the details correspond to 1155 A.D., December 25. The Śaka year was current.

It records a gift of land to the god Mallikārjuna in Kapilāśrama by Gayādharanāyaka, Pergaḍe Sōmanātha-nāyaka, Karaṇa Rāyarasa and others with the approval of the Sinda queen Lakshmidēvī, wife of Chāvuṇḍa. Lakshmīdēvī is said to have been administering the area granted by her husband.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vasumatigesada sōmanātha nu malladeyu cāmuṁḍamaṁḍaḷē śvarana paṭṭamahādēvi
maṁḍaḷikāgragaṇyanaja vēdaṁḍana dhāriṇi sattaya kū¨rmmeya gaṁḍana pe¨rmme
ta cauṁḍana cittapaṁkaruhadoḷnalasi¨rddapaḷūppa cauṁḍabhūmaṁḍaḷanāthanagrasati lakṣmivirājipa
yeṁdadi . svastyanavarataparamakalyāṇābhyudayasahasraphaḷabhōgabhāgini dvitīya lakṣmī
samāne kaḷahaṁsayāne dānacintāmaṇi janacūḍāmaṇiyantaṟpu rāgrēsari sava
tigajakēsari yācakajanadāridryasaṁharaṇe guṇagaṇābharaṇe sahajamrigamadāmōda budhaja
nāhlāde . sāhasōttuṁge vijayavaijayantinūtanadamayanti siṁdamukuṁda cāvuṁḍa dēvava
kṣasthaḷanivāsa lakṣmīdēvi śrīmatsiṁdamahādēvi lakṣmīdēvi . ka . soṁḍi hosavūrā kara keṟemaṁḍalado
ḷnegaḷda pativūraṁ cāvuṁḍaṁ kuḍe paramasukhadi nāḷuttiddaḷu . Alli . Esada
grihaṁgaḷi nesaguṁ hosa vū¨rsirigikkadāṇame
ne vasumatiyoḷ . pa ya satyada puruṣā¨rthada janma bhūmi kaligavuṁḍa niravadyaṁ ta
sau¨ryyaśāḷi siṁgagavuṁḍa . mattamalli . v® . payōdhini¨rmmaḷa sarasvati [pe¨rddoṟe]
tuṁge dakṣiṇa gōdāvarīdēvi siṁdhu yamunānadītī¨rtthajalaṁgaḷalla miṁtāvagavalla moṁdeḍege baṁdodavo
ppa khya tī¨rtthadoḷ dēvaradēvanoppi nalasi¨rddanaḷaṁkritamallikā¨rjjunaṁ . saraḷatamāḷatāḷasa
kāvaka mucukuṁda kuṁda lavalī haricaṁdana tiṁtri ṇī ka¨rppūrasu
bhūruhavanāḷiyiṁ karamoppi tōṟuguṁ nirupama mallikā¨rjjuna nivāsama munī
śapūjitaṁ . niravadyakī¨rtti ramyaṁ dharegesada jñānaśakti tatsiṣyaṁ bhāsuraguṇaniḷayaṁ negaḷda [dha¨rmata]
pōrāsi yenisi rākhyaṁ Ācā¨ryapadaviyoḷire © samastarājya bharanirū
pita mahāmātyapadavīvirājamāna kānīna lakṣmādēvī padapaṁ kajamadhukara . nijō
karasavaṇi garima saṁgrāma maṁtrijanalalāṭa paṭṭa . gō
trapavitra . baṁdhujanamitra Ityakhiḷanāmāṁkamāḷikāvirājitarappa sōmanāthanāya ka¨rgge .
su hita nante negaḻdareḷayoḷatiśayapuṇya¨rppatibhakta kēśa va
saṁstutyaguṇaniḷayanesava dēvar . © mattaṁ pe[¨rgga]ḍe sōma nāthanā
yakaruṁ gayādharanāyakaru karaṇaṁ rāyarasanuṁ mācirājanuṁ pratika
ṇṭhakēśavadēvanuṁ mādhavadēvanuṁ śrīmallakṣmādēviya¨rgge biṁnapaṁ geydu śrīma
tu kapilāśrama doṟavatīrada śrī mallikā¨rjjanadēva¨rgge sakava¨rṣaṁ
1076 ne yuva saṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 14 sōmavāra Uttarāya
ṇa saṁkrāṁtiyanu biṭṭa gadde pū¨rbbadalu dēva¨rgge naḍava ha
raḷu mattaru 8 he¨rggaḍe gāmuḍaṇaṁ biṭṭa Ajjaṁcegeyi mattaru 3
pratipāḷipudī dha¨rmmamanatiśayadiṁdarasu gāvuṁḍu sanmati
yiṁdaṟuvattokkalumatibhaktiyineṁṭuhiṭṭumācaṁdrā¨rkkaṁ . kara
mesavī dha¨rmmava noppire pāḷisidaṁganantapuṇyaṁ sā¨rguṁ doregeṭṭiḷida
durātmaṁ dhare paḷiyalu rauravakke gaḷagaḷanaḷiguṁ © śivāya namaḥ
paramatapōdhanare vipraradoppe śivaprasiddhasāsanamasusthiramā
gire pāḷisuta dhareyaṁ cāvuṁḍa nripaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
